title: GBFS Audit Catalogue — station record
description: A certified, anomaly-flagged reference dataset of 46,307 bike-sharing stations across 123 French operators, with per-row audit verdicts (seven data-quality classes A1–A7) and contextual enrichment from INSEE, BAAC, BD TOPO, BD ALTI and the national GTFS aggregator.

uid.description: Audit Catalogue primary key (stable per certified station).

system_name.description: Operator-system label as published in the feed.

source.description: Feed URL or canonical-catalogue source pointer.

capacity.description: Raw declared dock capacity (may be a placeholder or null).

n_stations_system.description: Total number of stations in the parent system.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp of the audited feed snapshot.

elevation_m.description: Ground elevation in metres (IGN BD ALTI).

topography_roughness_index.description: Local relief amplitude around the station.

infra_cyclable_km.description: Cycle-lane linear within a 300 m buffer (IGN BD TOPO), km.

infra_cyclable_pct.description: Share of dedicated cycle right-of-way in the buffer.

baac_accidents_cyclistes.description: Severe cyclist-crash count within 500 m over 5 years (ONISR BAAC).

gtfs_heavy_stops_300m.description: Heavy-transit stops within 300 m (national GTFS aggregator).

gtfs_stops_within_300m_pct.description: Share of accessible heavy-transit stops in the buffer.

revenu_median_uc.description: INSEE Filosofi median disposable income per consumption unit.

station_type.description: Audited station type: docked_bike, free_floating or carsharing.

capacity_raw.description: Raw GBFS capacity preserved verbatim (NaN/placeholders kept).

capacity_audited.description: Post-audit capacity; NaN for non-dock types.

flag_A1.description: Structural error A1: out-of-domain inclusion (carsharing under a bike schema).

flag_A2.description: Structural error A2: placeholder capacity constant across a system.

flag_A3.description: Structural error A3: structural over-capacity (free-floating anchor).

flag_A4.description: Structural error A4: topology-aware geospatial outlier (HDBSCAN + spectral).

flag_A5.description: Structural error A5: out-of-perimeter coverage (bbox > 50,000 km²).

audit_confidence.description: Per-row audit confidence: high, medium or low.

nearest_system_dist_m.description: Distance to the nearest station of a different system (metres).

catchment_density_per_km2.description: Stations per km² within a 1 km buffer.
